string.name: location_reason
string.value: Used to record your travel route and the location of memory nodes on the map

string.name: media_reason
string.value: Used to select profile pictures and travel photos

string.name: internet_reason
string.value: Used for cloud data sync, map loading, and AI-generated captions

string.name: network_info_reason
string.value: Used to switch to offline mode when no network is available

string.name: privacy_dialog_content
string.value:
Welcome to ItsMapPin. Before using this app, please carefully read the User Agreement and Privacy Policy. The Privacy Policy explains:

• How we collect, use, store, and protect your personal information (including location, photos, account info)
• Your rights to access, correct, delete, and deactivate your account
• How we use Huawei Cloud services for data synchronization
• How we use AI services to recognize content in photos you choose to upload

If you agree, tap "Agree and Continue" to start using the app.

string.name: account_delete_warning
string.value: Deleting your account will permanently remove all your cloud data (travels, photos, memory nodes). This action cannot be undone. Continue?

string.name: account_delete_second_confirm
string.value: I understand my data will be permanently deleted
